settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Node identity, security, storage and language configuration

language.title: Interface Language
language.description: Select the application display language for the user interface.

restart.title: Restart Required
restart.reason_port: A restart is required to apply the new GUI Port configuration. Click the 'Restart Panel' button to apply.
restart.reason_logging: A restart is required to apply the new Logging configuration. Click the 'Restart Panel' button to apply.
restart.reason_both: A restart is required to apply the new GUI Port and Logging configurations. Click the 'Restart Panel' button to apply.

dashboard.title: DASHBOARD
dashboard.subtitle: Monitoring and controlling FFMPEG nodes
dashboard.hardwareIntrospection: Real-time introspection of host media acceleration capabilities, sound servers, and capture hardware devices.
dashboard.schedulerDescription: Real-time monitor of task schedules, cron intervals, and batch processes.

forge.title: FFMPEG FORGE
forge.subtitle: Build Profiles Manager
forge.allDepsInstalled: All required critical dependencies are installed.
forge.missingDeps: Essential tools required to compile FFmpeg are missing.
forge.createFirstProfile: Create your first FFmpeg build profile to get started
forge.envDescription: FFmpeg Forge requires low-level compilers and external codec libraries to generate an optimized binary.
forge.nvidiaExcludedNote: * Optional NVIDIA dependencies (clang, nvidia-cuda-dev) have been excluded as no NVIDIA GPU was detected on this host.
forge.commandWillInstall: This command will install exactly the system dependencies detected as missing.
forge.allSet: 🎉 Everything ready! Your system has all dependencies installed.

sources.listenerDesc: Listener Mode: FFmpeg opens a local UDP socket on port and waits.
sources.callerDesc: Caller Mode: FFmpeg actively connects to remote host on port.
sources.rendezvousDesc: Rendezvous Mode: Both nodes must use Rendezvous mode on the same port.
sources.ndiAvahiCommandHint: Please run sudo systemctl enable --now avahi-daemon to start it.
sources.scanningNdi: 🔍 Searching for active NDI sources on the local network...
sources.foundNdiSources: ✓ Found {{count}} NDI sources on the network.
sources.ndiScanError: ❌ Communication error while scanning NDI sources.
sources.clickToSelectNdi: 👉 Click here to see the list and select a detected source.
sources.hardwareDecodingDesc: Offloads video decoding to the selected GPU. Recommended for high-bitrate file or network inputs.
sources.gpuMemoryVram: GPU Memory (VRAM) — High Performance GPU Transcode
sources.systemMemoryDesc: Copies decoded frames to system RAM. Works with all software filters/encoders.
sources.gpuMemoryDesc: Keeps decoded frames in VRAM. Bypasses CPU copies, requires hardware filters/encoders.

destinations.callerMode: Caller (Client Mode — push stream to remote listener)
destinations.listenerMode: Listener (Server Mode — wait for remote caller to fetch stream)
destinations.callerDesc: Caller Mode: FFmpeg pushes the stream to remote listener.
destinations.listenerDesc: Listener Mode: FFmpeg opens port. Transcoding starts when a client connects.
destinations.rendezvousDesc: Rendezvous Mode: Peer-to-peer connection. Requires the same port on both nodes.
destinations.ndiAvahiCommandHint: Please run sudo systemctl enable --now avahi-daemon to start it.
destinations.decklinkNotice: DeckLink Physical Output: DeckLink playout cards require uncompressed video and audio (such as v210/rawvideo in UYVY 4:2:2 format, and PCM audio). Configure compatible codecs in the codecs tab.
destinations.hlsNoStorageWarning: ⚠️ No HLS storages configured. Please configure at least one storage of type "HLS" in Settings to use local HLS output.
destinations.hlsExtensionNote: The .m3u8 extension will be added automatically

filters.filtersNotAvailable: Filters are only available when video or audio streams are enabled.
filters.videoCodecCopyNotice: ⚠️ Video codec is set to 'copy'. Video filters and scaling are disabled because the stream is copied directly without re-encoding.
filters.enableDeinterlacing: Enable Deinterlacing (YADIF / QSV VPP / CUDA yadif)
filters.noYadifCudaSupport: ⚠️ The active FFmpeg binary does not support the 'yadif_cuda' hardware filter. We recommend changing the output format to 'System Memory (CPU RAM)' in the Source tab, or recompiling with CUDA Filters support.
filters.noDeinterlaceVaapiSupport: ⚠️ The active FFmpeg binary does not support the 'deinterlace_vaapi' hardware filter. We recommend changing the output format to 'System Memory (CPU RAM)' in the Source tab.
filters.noVppQsvSupport: ⚠️ The active FFmpeg binary does not support the 'vpp_qsv' hardware filter. We recommend changing the output format to 'System Memory (CPU RAM)' in the Source tab.
filters.audioCodecCopyNotice: ⚠️ Audio codec is set to 'copy'. Audio filters and DSP settings are disabled because the stream is copied directly without re-encoding.
filters.videoCodecCopyOverlayNotice: ⚠️ Video codec is set to 'copy'. Overlays cannot be applied because the stream is copied directly without re-encoding.
filters.noOverlaysYet: No overlay layers added yet. Click "+ Text Overlay" or "+ Image Overlay" above to start building broadcast graphics.
